svg.text: Peeling Instrument — Electrical Schematic (Pico W + DM542T + NEMA17)
⚠ MAINS 220 V AC — HAZARDOUS — UNPLUG BEFORE WORKING
+ pins tied to +5 V, − pins to GPIO
Microstep / current: set via DIP switches
→ micro-B cable → Pico W USB port
ENA− asserted LOW → first PUL ≥ 200 ms (firmware uses 500 ms delay)
DIR stable before PUL ≥ 5 µs (firmware: setDirectionPin 40 µs)
Pico GPIO = 3.3 V; DM542T min HIGH = 3.5 V
→ Level shifter or 5 V drive (ENA+/DIR+/PUL+ tied to 5 V)
Motor microstep setting: set via DM542T DIP SW1–SW6
Planned: Waveshare Pico-ResTouch-LCD-3.5 (firmware pin reassignment pending)
DC 5 V (~3 solder joints): TSR → Pico VSYS
